name: Cow Weighted Plush Kids' Throw Pillow Black/White - Pillowfort™
description:
This Weighted Plush Throw Pillow Cow from Pillowfort™ will be your child's new favorite bedtime companion. Designed in the shape of a cow, this black-and-white figural throw pillow comes complete with a pink-detailed mouth and ears, gray hooves and a fuzzy fringe-tipped tail. Made of polyester with spandex and 100% polyester fill, this novelty throw pillow is weighted to keep them feeling comfy and secure.

Not intended to be used for infants. Suitable for ages 3+
Not Microwave Safe
